title:
Lesson 1:
I'm Distracted / I Need to Focus
description: 'Estoy distraído/distraída' = I'm distracted (use -o if male, -a if female). 'Necesito enfocarme' = I need to focus. 'Necesito poner atención' = I need to pay attention. 'Estaba pensando en otra cosa' = I was thinking about something else.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.spanish: ¿Me escuchaste? Dije tu nombre tres veces.
dialogue.english: Did you hear me? I said your name three times.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.spanish: Perdón, estaba pensando en otra cosa.
dialogue.english: Sorry, I was thinking about something else.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.english: You're right. I need to focus more.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.spanish: Sobre todo en el trabajo. Necesitas poner atención.
dialogue.english: Especially at work. You need to pay attention.

vocabulary.english: I was thinking about something else
